mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart (id, name, image, user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time) VALUES (#{id},#{name},#{image},#{userId},#{dishId},#{setmealId},#{dishFlavor},#{number},#{amount},#{createTime});
mapper.select: select * from shopping_cart where user_id=#{userId} order by create_time desc;
